codeReview.summary: Re-reviewed commit `28531782fc84f97da49977eea325f7a79356ae0d`, the follow-up commit `6c9cf52c802d607c9a45c633ab458f4f9e5c5b36`, and the current branch tip. The follow-up packet remediates the original production/test/guard mismatch by changing `IntegrationCoordinator.updateFulfillment` and its assertions/guard checks to `/api/v1/dispatch/confirm`, but it does not update the frontend handoff documents that were part of the original failing evidence. The milestone therefore still carries stale canonical-path guidance for dispatch-like orchestrator fulfillment rejections.

issues.description: The follow-up fixes runtime/test/guard behavior, but the milestone still leaves stale frontend handoff guidance that tells orchestrator fulfillment callers to use the accounting-only `/api/v1/sales/dispatch/confirm` endpoint instead of the factory-operational `/api/v1/dispatch/confirm` endpoint.
issues.evidence: After follow-up commit `6c9cf52c802d607c9a45c633ab458f4f9e5c5b36`, the current branch runtime now throws `Use /api/v1/dispatch/confirm.` with `canonicalPath=/api/v1/dispatch/confirm` in `erp-domain/src/main/java/com/bigbrightpaints/erp/orchestrator/service/IntegrationCoordinator.java:287-288`, and `scripts/guard_workflow_canonical_paths.sh:122-123` enforces that same path. But the current branch still documents the fulfillment rejection path as `/api/v1/sales/dispatch/confirm` in `.factory/library/frontend-v2.md:23` and `.factory/library/frontend-handoff.md:2120`. `git show --stat 6c9cf52c802d607c9a45c633ab458f4f9e5c5b36` shows the follow-up only touched `IntegrationCoordinator.java`, `OrchestratorControllerIT.java`, `IntegrationCoordinatorTest.java`, and `scripts/guard_workflow_canonical_paths.sh`, so the stale docs evidence from the original fail remains unresolved.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The follow-up feature partially remediates the original failure by aligning runtime behavior, targeted regression tests, and the canonical-path guard with `/api/v1/dispatch/confirm`.

Because the milestone tip still contains stale handoff documentation, the original review should remain a blocking fail for milestone synthesis rather than being downgraded to historical-only context.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Current branch docs still say dispatch-like fulfillment requests should use `/api/v1/sales/dispatch/confirm` in `.factory/library/frontend-v2.md:23` and `.factory/library/frontend-handoff.md:2120`, which conflicts with the implemented rejection details in `IntegrationCoordinator.java:287-288`.

summary: Fail. The follow-up feature fixes the fulfillment rejection path in code/tests/guard, but the current milestone still leaves stale frontend handoff guidance pointing dispatch-like orchestrator fulfillment callers at `/api/v1/sales/dispatch/confirm`, so the original issue remains unresolved and should still count as a blocking failure for synthesis.
